title: 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip
excerpt: From iconic film studios to world-class museums, a 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip gives students a front-row seat to entertainment, art, science, and culture. Here’s what the journey looks like, day by day.
seoTitle: 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip - Landmark Educational Tours
seoDescription: Discover a 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip, from Griffith Observatory to the Getty Center. Plan your student group's trip today.
html:
5 Day Los Angeles School Trip: A Day-by-Day Look at an Unforgettable Student Journey

Los Angeles is a city built on creativity, innovation, and storytelling, making it one of the most dynamic destinations for student travel. From the world of film and music to hands-on science and iconic architecture, a 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip gives students the opportunity to explore multiple facets of American culture in a single, well-rounded itinerary. At Landmark Educational Tours, we’ve designed this trip to balance education and excitement, ensuring students leave with a deeper understanding of the city and the industries that call it home. Here’s a closer look at what a 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip Sample Itinerary with Landmark Educational Tours has to offer.

5 Day Los Angeles School Trip

Day 1: Arrival in Los Angeles

The journey begins with students arriving in Los Angeles and checking into their hotel accommodations. After settling in, the group comes together for a welcome dinner, giving students a chance to relax, connect with their classmates, and prepare for the days of exploration ahead.

Day 2: Downtown Culture, Music History, and City Views

The second day of the trip introduces students to the heart of downtown Los Angeles. The morning begins with a visit to Olvera Street and El Pueblo de Los Angeles Historical Monument, one of the oldest and most historically rich areas in the city. From there, students explore downtown’s architectural landmarks, including the striking Walt Disney Concert Hall and the historic Bradbury Building.

After a lunch stop at Grand Central Market, the group visits The Broad, a contemporary art museum known for its bold, thought-provoking exhibits. The afternoon continues with a visit to the Grammy Museum, where students can explore the history of music and the artists who have shaped it. The day wraps up with a group dinner and an evening visit to the Griffith Observatory, offering sweeping views of the city skyline and a memorable close to a busy day.

Day 3: Behind-the-Scenes Filmmaking and Venice Beach

Day three shifts the focus to the entertainment industry with a behind-the-scenes film studio tour, giving students insight into how movies are made from concept to screen. After lunch in Culver City, the group heads to Venice Beach for an afternoon of exploration along the famous boardwalk and canals.

Students can stroll through the Venice Canals, a quiet and picturesque contrast to the energy of the boardwalk, before the group gathers for a sit-down dinner in Venice to close out the day.

Day 4: Science, Film History, and Live Entertainment

The fourth day of a 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip combines science and entertainment in one action-packed itinerary. The morning starts with a visit to the California Science Center, where interactive exhibits bring STEM concepts to life. After lunch, the group heads to the Hollywood Walk of Fame and the TCL Chinese Theatre, followed by a Red Line tour highlighting iconic film locations throughout the city.

The day concludes with a group dinner and a live show at one of LA’s celebrated venues, such as the Pantages Theater, Walt Disney Concert Hall, Hollywood Bowl, or Ahmanson Theatre, giving students a firsthand look at the city’s thriving performing arts scene.

Day 5: The Getty Center and Departure

On the final day, students visit the Getty Center, renowned for its stunning architecture, gardens, and extensive art collection. After lunch in Westwood Village, the group departs for home, bringing along a wealth of new experiences and memories from their time in Los Angeles.

Start Planning Your 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip

A 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip offers students a rich, immersive experience that blends creativity, culture, and hands-on learning in one of the most iconic cities in the country. At Landmark Educational Tours, we take care of the details so educators can focus on what matters most: giving students an experience they’ll never forget. Contact us today to start planning your group’s 5 Day Los Angeles School Trip.
